D1 Optics L5 Evaluate Reference

Laser Cavity Gain & Threshold

pump a gain medium until round-trip gain beats loss and the beam switches on

Light bounces between two mirrors through an amplifying medium. Lasing begins only when one round-trip gains more than it loses to output coupling and absorption.

Raise the pump and adjust the output mirror reflectivity. Below threshold output stays near zero; above it, power rises almost linearly. The curve marks the threshold kink and operating point.
